case_title: NAVY FEDERAL CREDIT UNION VS. JUSTIN CARDENAS CARLISLE

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-24-2026 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-24-2026 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
